div.head: 3. Telegram From the Central Intelligence Agency to the CIA Station in [place not declassified]Source: Central Intelligence Agency, Job 79–01025A, Box 7, Folder 1. Secret; Priority.

list.item: It is requested that JULEP locate but not contact Carlos Castillo Armas if in Salvador or Honduras. If located, headquarters should be continually advised of major movements. Reference gives reported permanent [less than 1 line of source text not declassified] address in Honduras.
Authorization given for JULEP travel Honduras during investigation.
